details: Developed microservices using Spring Boot and REST, integrated with AngularJS.
Administered and optimized Linux systems for high availability.
Implemented security hardening and best practices for Linux environments.
Automated workflows using Python and Bash for file processing and validation.
Applied TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP & firewall expertise for network reliability.
Followed Agile Scrum covering analysis, design, testing, and deployment.
